page.title: Membership
page.description: Manage your subscription and plan details.

scope.title: Your plan scope and referral boundaries
scope.subtitle: Membership supports the launch claim types first. Guidance-only categories stay advisory, and out-of-scope matters are routed outside the plan.

launch.title: Handled now
launch.description: These claim types fit the launch recovery path when there is a plausible monetary outcome.
items: Personal injury claims with a monetary recovery path
launch.note: Your plan covers triage and document review here. Staff-led recovery starts only after case acceptance.

guidance.title: Guidance only
guidance.description: These categories can stay inside membership guidance and document review, but not success-fee escalation.
items: Landlord disputes without a direct monetary recovery path
Wage withholding or employment disputes without a clear payout path
Repair enforcement or contract termination disputes without a direct payout
Broader consumer complaints outside the launch claim types
guidance.note: These matters remain advisory inside the plan and may be referred onward when needed.

outOfScope.title: Out of scope
outOfScope.description: These matters are not part of the launch contract and are not accepted for staff handling.
items: General business disputes outside defined group packages
outOfScope.note: These matters stay referral-only or declined rather than moving into plan handling.

boundary.title: Referral boundaries
boundary.body: Membership does not convert every matter into staff handling. We review scope first, accept only cases with a real recovery path, and ask for separate opt-in before any external legal partner action.
items: External legal partner action requires a separate written opt-in after case acceptance.
Flight delay compensation is not part of the current launch handling path.

freeStart.title: Free Start is informational only
freeStart.body: Free Start gives you informational guidance, templates, and next-step tools. It does not start human review, legal advice, or staff-led recovery.

hotline.title: Hotline means routing and support
hotline.body: The hotline is for urgent routing, support, and next-step guidance. It does not mean immediate legal review, claim acceptance, or staff-led handling.

plan.title: Current Plan
plan.cancel_confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel? You will lose access at the end of the billing period.

benefits.title: Usage & Benefits
benefits.restore_message: Update your payment to restore access to benefits.
benefits.activate_message: Use the pricing page to activate your protection.

ops.title: Subscriptions
ops.no_membership_body: You do not have an active paid membership yet. Choose a plan to continue into checkout and unlock claim access.
ops.membership_not_active_body: This membership is not active yet. Complete checkout to restore protection and claim access.

actions.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel? Cancellation only changes future renewal and your current access remains active until the current billing period ends.
actions.cancel_keeps_access_until: Your membership access stays active until {date}.
actions.refund_eligible: Your request is still within the 30-day launch refund window and will be checked against the published terms.
actions.refund_window_closed: The 30-day launch refund window has closed, so cancellation only affects future renewal.
actions.accepted_escalation_survives: Accepted recovery matters keep their surviving escalation terms after membership cancellation.
actions.cooling_off_applies_separately: Any statutory cooling-off rights are reviewed separately under the published terms.

errors.action_failed: We could not complete that membership action. Please try again.

activation.title: Sponsored seat pending activation
activation.body: Your sponsor has reserved this plan for you. Activate it to begin your covered membership period.

upgrade.title: Family upgrade available
upgrade.body: Your sponsor covers the individual tier. Upgrade to family coverage if you want household access on your own plan.

dunning.payment_failed_message: Your last payment was unsuccessful. Please update your payment method to avoid losing access to your membership benefits.
dunning.suspended_message: Your grace period has expired and your membership is now suspended. Please update your payment method to restore access.

success.title: Welcome to Interdomestik!
success.subtitle: Your membership is now active. You are officially part of our network.
success.pending_subtitle: Your payment was received. Membership activation is still in progress.
success.active_note: Your membership is active in the member portal and claim access is ready.
success.pending_note: We are still finalizing activation. Open your dashboard now and refresh this page once membership status catches up.
success.classification_note: Your member ID is active now. Filing-country routing is confirmed later when we review your member details.
success.onboarding_note: We will complete account onboarding with a sign-in link first. If needed, you can set a password afterward.
success.activation_pending_body: Your payment was received and we are finalizing account activation. You can open your dashboard now, and claim access will appear as soon as activation completes.

hotline_disclaimer.title: Routing and support only
hotline_disclaimer.body: Use the hotline for urgent routing, support, and next-step guidance. It does not mean immediate legal review or automatic case acceptance.

success.hotline_hint: Save this number to your phone now
success.cta_helper: Open your dashboard to review membership status, or start a claim as soon as activation is complete.
success.cta_helper_pending: Open your dashboard now, then refresh this page to check whether activation has completed.

card.title: Digital ID Card
card.subtitle: Your Membership Identity
card.description: Present this card for verification during emergencies or at our partner locations.

hotline_disclaimer.title: Routing and support only
hotline_disclaimer.body: Use the hotline for urgent routing, support, and next-step guidance. It does not mean immediate legal review or automatic case acceptance.
